comment: Not sure if this is the same climb but there is a flake on this wall that leads into a great little V3 slab climb. Start both hands on the flake and move up on crimps/crystals until you get to the lip. There is a seam just over the top of the rock that you can use to pull yourself up. A bit of a dumpy landing since there is a rock inconveniently right under you.
